verif_result.fix_hint: Simulation completed but values disagreed. max_error=1 across 1204224 samples. See first_mismatch_* and expected/got for raw evidence.
verif_result.verilator_stderr: Simulation completed but values disagreed. max_error=1 across 1204224 samples. See first_mismatch_* and expected/got for raw evidence.
verif_result.classifier_reason: Simulation completed successfully with correct output count (6272/6272) and correct data values in 99.93% of samples. The only failures are: (1) timing off by exactly 1 cycle (actual=2049 vs expected=2048) — a pipeline register count/latency constant mismatch, and (2) max_error=1 across 897 mismatches with negative bias (signed_error_sum=-357, negative_error_count=627 vs positive=270) — consistent with an off-by-one rounding mode or truncation vs. round-half-up difference in the quantization/accumulation logic. Both are local RTL logic bugs: a missing pipeline stage or wrong latency parameter, and a rounding mode mismatch. No resource, bus width, or architectural constraint violations present.
